medical_history.history_of_present_illness: Following arrival to the general medical floor, the patient refused to answer further questions about her presentation, though stated repeatedly "I have PAIN. I need PAIN MEDICATION." Patient has a history of ___ syndrome s/p proctocolectomy with ileostomy complicated by multiple prior abdominal surgeries, small bowel obstructions, and chronic pain. She was prescribed narcotic pain medication (Dilaudid 6 mg PO Q3H) by her current PCP but violated her contract by taking more medication than prescribed. She was initially aggressive and verbally abusive to staff. Vitals were recorded as T 98.8, HR 90, BP 102/64, RR 18, O2 sat 100% RA. The patient initially tried to leave AMA.
medical_history.past_medical_history: ___ syndrome s/p proctocolectomy with ileostomy at age ___; approximately 8 abdominal surgeries with multiple SBOs; chronic abdominal pain; Borderline Personality Disorder; PTSD; Bipolar Disorder; Polysubstance Abuse; Multiple psychiatric admissions; Left eye cataract/mole leading to blindness in left eye; Partial hysterectomy.
medical_history.family_history: Mother and sister both passed away of complications related to ___ syndrome.

physical_examination.general_examination: Awake in bed, NAD, refuses to answer many questions. Vitals on admission were: T 98.8, HR 90, BP 102/64, RR 18, O2 sat 100% RA.
physical_examination.specialty_examination: Psychiatric evaluation noted splitting behavior throughout the interview. Patient displayed aggressive affect and was rude to staff, with an unwillingness to discuss her plan of care.
